reviewedBuildOnly.BlueOak-1.0.0: Permissive build-tool license; not shipped as application code.
reviewedBuildOnly.CC-BY-3.0: SPDX metadata used by SBOM tooling; attribution retained in the dependency graph.
reviewedBuildOnly.MPL-2.0: CSS compiler dependency used at build time only; no MPL source is bundled into the application.
reviewedBuildOnly.Python-2.0: argparse@2.0.1 is reached only through electron-builder -> js-yaml and is absent from the production dependency graph and packaged application runtime.
reviewedBuildOnly.WTFPL: truncate-utf8-bytes@1.0.2 is reached only through electron-builder -> builder-util -> sanitize-filename and is absent from the production dependency graph and packaged application runtime.
